Finding: Initial step selects the penultimate state_change event
Action: Default to the first execution step so pasted programs do not inherit fixture-shaped navigation

Finding: Graph Inspector is the default view and appears before Flow
Action: Make Flow default and order Flow; State; Guided Trace; Graph Inspector

Finding: Examples copy claims every quick example uses the default accumulate function
Action: Replace with structurally neutral learner copy

Finding: Every detected pattern links to the accumulation lesson
Action: Map verified patterns to valid lesson routes and omit a link when no route exists

Finding: Try-next prompts are accumulation-specific for every pasted program
Action: Use structurally neutral rename/input transfer prompts

Finding: Fixture path is used only as a repository-root marker
Action: No product output depends on the fixture

Finding: Flagship demo intentionally loads the accumulation fixture
Action: Keep isolated to the named flagship demo loader

Finding: Pathway status and lesson duration are fixed
Action: Review during class-route phase; not used to derive execution output

Finding: Lesson presentation branches directly on accumulate slug
Action: New search and mutation routes use content-driven objectives and pattern steps; remaining flagship copy is intentionally accumulation-specific

Finding: Example environment file contained a credential-like API key
Action: Remove the value; keep secrets only in ignored local environment
